name: KEY TRONIC CORP
summary: Key Tronic Corporation is a contract manufacturer providing integrated electronic and mechanical engineering, precision plastic molding, sheet metal fabrication, printed circuit board assembly, component sourcing, worldwide logistics, and product testing. Originally founded as a computer keyboard manufacturer, the company now serves OEM customers across multiple industries from facilities in the United States, Mexico, China, and Vietnam, differentiating itself through vertical integration and design engineering support.

products.name: Printed Circuit Board Assembly
products.description: SMT and pin through hole PCB assembly for OEM customers

products.name: Precision Plastic Molding
products.description: Injection molding and liquid injection molding for product components

products.name: Sheet Metal Fabrication
products.description: Precision metal stamping, fabricating, finishing, and painting

products.name: Product Design and Engineering
products.description: Research, development, and engineering support including prototype design

products.name: Complex Product Assembly
products.description: Full product assembly and automated functional testing for OEM products

products.name: Worldwide Logistics
products.description: Component sourcing, procurement, and global supply-chain management
